procedure.name: SystemSettings
procedure.text: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[SystemSettings]') AND type in (N'U')) CREATE TABLE [SystemSettings] ( [ModuleUid] [uniqueidentifier] NOT NULL, [SettingKey] nvarchar(255) NOT NULL, [SettingValue] nvarchar(max) CONSTRAINT [PK_SystemSettings] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [ModuleUid] ASC, [SettingKey] ASC ) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY]

procedure.name: GuidToCharSql
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION [GUID_TO_CHAR_SQL] (@UidId uniqueidentifier) RETURNS varchar(36) AS BEGIN /*Преобразование GUID в строку с правильным UID-ом */ RETURN CONVERT(varchar(36), @UidId); END

procedure.name: CharToGuidSql
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION [CHAR_TO_GUID_SQL] (@UidId varchar(36)) RETURNS uniqueidentifier AS BEGIN /*Преобразование GUID в строку с правильным UID-ом */ RETURN CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, @UidId); END

index.name: IX_SJRI_IdDesc
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_SJRI_IdDesc] ON [SchedulerJobRunInfo] ( [TriggerId] ASC, [Id] DESC )
